CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-05-2018 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-28-2017 Continued To Feb-21-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Request For Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jan-04-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Arlo Hale Smith, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff Denis Norrington.
Denis Norrington appeared, sworn and examined.
No appearance by defaulted defendant James Coppfer.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1-100 dismissed. Counsel to file papers.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant as follows:
Special damages $186.55, costs $339, General damages $5000.00 for a total of 5525.55.
Judgment signed in open court.
